queries.question: What value and description do we have for each bank statement?
queries.sql: SELECT Information.description, Information.value  from Bank_Statement_Information join Information on Bank_Statement_Information.information_id = Information.info_id join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id = Bank_Statements.statement_id   GROUP BY Bank_Statement_Information.information_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: What value and description do we have for each bank statement?
queries.sql: select bank_statements.statement_id , information.description , information.value from Bank_Statement_Information join Information on Bank_Statement_Information.information_id = Information.info_id join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id = Bank_Statements.statement_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?statement_id ?description ?value WHERE {
  ?bank_statement_information a :Bank_Statement_Information .
  ?information a :Information .
  ?bank_statement_information p:hasInformation ?information .
  ?bank_statements a :Bank_Statements .
  ?bank_statement_information p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:statement_id ?statement_id .
  ?information p:description ?description .
  ?information p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: What description of information do we have for every bank statement?
queries.sql: SELECT Information.description  from Bank_Statement_Information join Information on Bank_Statement_Information.information_id = Information.info_id join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id = Bank_Statements.statement_id   GROUP BY Bank_Statement_Information.information_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)

queries.question: For each bank statement, show me all of the value information they have
queries.sql: select bank_statements.statement_id , information.value from Bank_Statement_Information join Information on Bank_Statement_Information.information_id = Information.info_id join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id = Bank_Statements.statement_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?statement_id ?value WHERE {
  ?bank_statement_information a :Bank_Statement_Information .
  ?information a :Information .
  ?bank_statement_information p:hasInformation ?information .
  ?bank_statements a :Bank_Statements .
  ?bank_statement_information p:hasBank_Statements ?bank_statements .
  ?bank_statements p:statement_id ?statement_id .
  ?information p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: List the value information that is common for all bank statements
queries.sql: SELECT Information.value  from Bank_Statement_Information join Information on Bank_Statement_Information.information_id = Information.info_id join Bank_Statements on Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id = Bank_Statements.statement_id   GROUP BY Bank_Statement_Information.information_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bank_Statement_Information.bank_statements_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Bank_Statements)
